data.summary: Exploratory evidence is insufficient to assert a hard requirement failure.
data.assessment: The exploratory step aimed to validate the requirement of creating a shadow customer profile when no claimed Bizing profile exists. However, the evidence does not include any specific checks or confirmations that this functionality was executed during the saga run. The linked use case describes the expected behavior but does not provide concrete evidence that the shadow customer profile was created in the absence of a claimed profile, indicating a gap in the validation process.
gaps: No evidence confirming the creation of a shadow customer profile when no claimed Bizing profile exists.

deterministicFollowUps.title: Add deterministic evidence contract
deterministicFollowUps.assertion: Define concrete endpoint calls and assertions that directly verify the creation of a shadow customer profile.
